fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Nebraska Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Nebraska - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity nebraska, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to nebraska, speech-language pathologist compact nebraska, nebraska speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology
board.parent_dept: Nebraska Department of Health and Human Services (DHHS)
board.mailing_address:
Nebraska Department of Health and Human Services
Licensure Unit
PO Box 94986
Lincoln, NE 68509-4986

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Nebraska.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Create an Account and Submit Online Application
steps.description: Navigate to the NE.licensing.online portal, create an account, and complete the online application for initial licensure as a Speech-Language Pathologist. Ensure you pay the required application fee.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Request your university to send official transcripts, verifying a master's or doctoral degree in Speech-Language Pathology from an accredited program, directly to the Nebraska DHHS Licensure Unit.

steps.title: Submit Praxis Examination Scores
steps.description: Arrange for the Educational Testing Service (ETS) to send your official Praxis examination scores directly to the Nebraska DHHS Licensure Unit.

steps.title: Verify Clinical Clock Hours
steps.description: Complete and submit the "Verification of Clinical Clock Hours" form (Form 17-640) outlining the completion of 300 clinical clock hours as part of your application.

steps.title: Submit Postgraduate Professional Experience Verification
steps.description: Complete and submit the "Verification of Postgraduate Professional Experience" form (Form 17-640) detailing your 9-month (36-week) supervised postgraduate professional employment experience (Clinical Fellowship Year).

telepractice_text: Nebraska permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Nebraska issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Nebraska is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Nebraska SLP license cost?
Is Nebraska part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Nebraska allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Nebraska have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Nebraska participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Nebraska without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Nebraska?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Nebraska while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Nebraska is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

hero.title: Become a Speech-Language Pathologist in Nebraska
hero.dek: Apply for your Speech-Language Pathologist license in Nebraska through the NE.licensing.online portal, where all applications are submitted online.

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the NE.licensing.online portal and select "Create Account" on the homepage to begin your online application.
